description: Case style: Steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortDial style: Black, round, textured dial with Titan logo at the 12 hour mark, date aperture at the 12 hour markStrap style: Black leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time, solid case back for enhanced durability, dual time displays, sapphire glass covering the dialWater resistance up to 30 mWarranty: 2 years
